---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
resources: Morris_CV.pdf
editor: visual
about:
  template: marquee
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: file-text
      text: CV
      href: Morris_CV.pdf
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=ktYcC8MAAAAJ&view_op=list_works&authuser=5&gmla=AH70aAWVyVJkXi7NWJQBqNzgLmUIHMp1BeJhLZbRPnf2S7CC718HviNud1FttDOMRthIlc1Uk9nKmh6UqikZp6jzrJmJ3KDwsfBwqg

    - icon: linkedin
      text: Linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/wesleytmorris/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:wtmorris@umd.edu
---

<a href="Morris_CV.pdf" class="download-btn" download>Download CV (PDF)</a>

<iframe src="Morris_CV.pdf" width="100%" height="1050px" style="border: none; margin-top: 1rem;"></iframe>
